title: Sweetspot Project Index
description: This schema defines the compact project index used to identify a repository, its modules, manifests, and scan state. Project maintainers, scanners, and registry tooling need it during project bootstrap and discovery. Read it before registering the repository or diagnosing why modules are absent from the portfolio. Remember that the index must point to the manifests that exist in the checked-out project.

x-sma-contract.change_policy: Optional additive fields preserve v1 compatibility; required, renamed, or narrowed fields require a new versioned $id and schema_version.
x-sma-contract.rollback: Consumers retain the v1 decoder during the compatibility window; rollback drops only additive optional fields and never rewrites immutable or historical evidence.
x-sma-contract.lifecycle: Created or regenerated by the listed writer, validated at its consumer boundary, and retained according to docs/SCHEMA_CONTRACTS.md.
x-sma-contract.retention: See docs/SCHEMA_CONTRACTS.md for the artifact-specific retention rule.
x-sma-contract.performance: Static file contract; database query plans, indexes, and full-scan budgets are not applicable. Validation performance is covered by schema-case selftests.

schema_version.description: Schema version that this document conforms to.

project.description: Project identifier associated with the record.

root.description: Repository root represented by this record.

commit.description: Git commit identifier associated with the recorded work.

stack.description: Ordered stack values for the project.

brick_id.description: Stable identifier of the brick associated with this record.

manifest_path.description: Repository-relative path to the referenced manifest.

score.description: Score as a whole number for the module.
